title: Flamingo - Software update for just charge case
scenario: Verify that a software update can be performed for just the charge case without updating the headset.
steps: Tap Update on device home screen -> Device settings opens with Software Update tab expanded, showing 'Update All' button and separate update buttons for headset and charge case.
Tap 'Update' next to charge case and complete DFU -> DFU for just charge case completes, and only the charge case is on the latest firmware.
expected: DFU for just charge case completes, and only the charge case is on the latest firmware.
